## Summary

Describe what this contribution changes in PNVA-Core.

## Type

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Proof artifact
- [ ] Validation protocol
- [ ] Runtime/model proposal
- [ ] Reproduction report

## Evidence

List commands, logs, screenshots or JSON artifacts used to validate the change.

## Safety

- [ ] No raw local proof data is exposed.
- [ ] No private path, token, host identifier or personal environment detail is exposed.
- [ ] Claims remain consistent with `docs/LIMITATIONS.md`.

## Checklist

- [ ] JSON files validate with `python3 -m json.tool`.
- [ ] Checksums were regenerated if files changed.
- [ ] Documentation links were updated.
